name: Heranba Industries Limited
summary: Heranba Industries Limited manufactures and markets a range of agrochemicals in India. The company engages in the research and development, manufacturing, marketing, and distribution of a range of crop protection chemicals, public health, and animal health solutions. It offers various pesticides, including insecticides, herbicides, fungicides, and public health products for pest control. It also provides growth/spreader products, such as amino acids, gibberellic acid 0.001%L, and seaweed extracts. In addition, the company exports its products to approximately 60 countries. The company was formerly known as Heranba Industrial Chemicals Limited and changed its name to Heranba Industries Limited in July 1996. Heranba Industries Limited was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
